description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, streamlined body with a glossy red exterior and a dark, rounded nose cone. The main hull is sculpted with aerodynamic curves and integrated side fins, giving it a futuristic appearance. The cockpit area is covered by a dark, semi-opaque canopy, suggesting a single-rider configuration. Metallic bolts and rivets are visible along the body, adding to its robust, industrial look. The underside includes a central support strut and a small, circular stand, likely for display or storage. The overall design is modern and sporty, with a focus on speed and maneuverability.
description: A glossy red, streamlined jet ski with a dark nose cone, aerodynamic curves, and a single-rider cockpit under a semi-opaque canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded dark nose cone, wide side fins, and the central support strut extending downward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, cockpit canopy, and the smooth, continuous curve of the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tapered tail, symmetrical side fins, and the central support strut with a circular base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit opening, hull contours, and metallic details.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is a simple, straight bar extending horizontally with rounded grips at each end, finished in black, and appears to have minimal visible controls.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat is a single, contoured position integrated into the hull, finished in a dark color, and shaped to cradle one rider comfortably.
